top_signals.title: Ireland Says Alumina Probe Finds No Proof of Russia Weapons Link
top_signals.summary: An investigation into alumina exports from Ireland to Russia has not found conclusive evidence linking a production plant to the manufacture of weapons in Russia, Irish Prime Minister Micheal Martin said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hundreds settle with HMRC as crypto tax crackdown continues
top_signals.summary: International reporting rules make it harder for investors to conceal gains
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Intel stock is down 27% from June record highs. How the chipmaker can reverse the slide

top_signals.title: Microsoft working to fix Exchange Online mailbox quarantine issue
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is working to resolve an ongoing Exchange Online issue that has been mistakenly quarantining customers' mailboxes since Sunday. [...]
